refined_fr.refined_fr: The NGHE solution shall derive performance requirements from worksite mission context, record these requirements with traceability, and manage updates including baselines and calibration history.
refined_fr.rationale: The original FR is broad; decomposing into derivation, recording, and management clarifies distinct functional concerns and supports traceability and history maintenance as required by constraints.
refined_fr.verification_idea: Verify by demonstrating documented performance targets traceable to worksite inputs and a maintained history of baseline and calibration updates.
sub_frs: Derive performance requirements from worksite mission context
Record derived performance requirements with traceability
Manage updates to performance requirements including baselines and calibration history

candidate_dps: Algorithmic derivation using worksite data models
Database schema for performance requirement storage
Version control and update management system
selected_dp.selected_dp: Algorithmic derivation using worksite data models; Database schema for performance requirement storage; Version control and update management system

potential_sources: Data flow between derivation algorithm and database
Update management interacting with both derivation and storage
coupling_check.notes: Logical separation of derivation, recording, and management reduces coupling; interfaces clearly defined.

assumptions_risks: Worksite mission context data is available and reliable
Performance requirements can be algorithmically derived
Database and version control systems can be integrated effectively
selected_dp.recommended_revision: Consider modularizing update management to reduce complexity if coupling increases in implementation.

im_boundary.name: NGHE Solution
im_boundary.scope: Encompasses derivation algorithms, performance requirement database, and update management modules as a cohesive solution

external_interfaces.name: Telemetry
external_interfaces.details: Receives worksite mission context and operational data for derivation

external_interfaces.name: Tasking
external_interfaces.details: Sends derived performance requirements to other system components

external_interfaces.name: Network Link
external_interfaces.details: Supports data exchange for updates and calibration history synchronization

module_containment_scores.notes: High containment as all related functions are centralized; low diffusion risk.
Poor containment; would require extensive interface diffusion.
Not suitable; unrelated to performance requirement derivation.
Limited relevance; containment and diffusion scores low.

assigned_im.containment_hypothesis: Centralizing the performance requirement derivation, recording, and management within the NGHE Solution module minimizes interface complexity and supports traceability.
containment_risks: Potential complexity in NGHE Solution module if not well modularized internally
Dependency on reliable telemetry data input
assigned_im.recommended_revision: Monitor internal modularization within NGHE Solution to avoid monolithic design.

fr_dp_gate.reason: Functional decomposition is clear and logically maps to selected DPs with manageable coupling.

diffusion_risks: Minimal diffusion risk due to centralized containment in NGHE Solution
dp_im_gate.containment_notes: Containment scores strongly favor NGHE Solution, supporting architectural clarity.

fr_im_gate.verification_feasibility: Verification can be performed via documented traceability and history records within NGHE Solution module.
fr_im_gate.allocation_clarity: Clear allocation of FRs to NGHE Solution IM with well-defined external interfaces.

recommended_revisions: Ensure internal modularization within NGHE Solution to manage complexity
Validate telemetry data reliability early in development

decision.justification: While the decomposition and assignments are sound, internal modularization within NGHE Solution and telemetry data assumptions require further refinement before proceeding.
next_level_sub_frs: Derive performance requirements from worksite mission context
Record derived performance requirements with traceability
Manage updates to performance requirements including baselines and calibration history

revise.why: To define internal modular boundaries within NGHE Solution for better complexity management and risk mitigation.

assumptions: Telemetry data is reliable and timely
Performance requirements derivation algorithms are feasible
open_risks: Potential monolithic design in NGHE Solution
evidence_needed: Telemetry data availability and quality reports
Prototype or simulation of derivation algorithm
